object_under_evaluation: public starter eval bundle integrity on the current aoa-evals corpus
claim_boundary: The repository can review whether public starter bundles stay coherent enough to support only their bounded claims, but the integrity read remains weaker than promotion review or direct agent evaluation.
limitations: This report does not prove direct agent quality.
This report does not prove canonical readiness by itself.

per_target_breakdown.note: The frozen same-task surface keeps style-only differences weaker than the baseline comparison evidence and does not narrate one same-task result as general growth.
per_target_breakdown.evidence_coverage: frozen fixture contract, runner contract, schema-backed report, and shared baseline dossier all align
per_target_breakdown.routing_note: public wording keeps the baseline surface separate from repeated-window movement and one-run workflow starters

per_target_breakdown.note: The bridge now has better paired artifacts, but it still must not be read as a baseline-default comparator.

per_target_breakdown.note: The longitudinal starter now has repeated-window proof artifacts, but the draft surface still needs cautious wording so ordered movement is not read as broad capability growth.
